description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout. The exterior features a mix of large windows, some with grid patterns, and solid wall sections, providing a balance of natural light and privacy. The house includes a double driveway leading to a spacious garage, and a separate entry path to the main door. There is a visible outdoor area, possibly a patio or pool, adjacent to the main living space. The color palette is primarily light gray and white, with some muted red or brown accents on certain wall sections. The overall design emphasizes open, interconnected spaces and a functional, urban-friendly footprint.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a double driveway leading to a garage. The exterior is light gray and white with clean lines and an open layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double driveway, garage doors, and main entry path with large windows and a clean facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, garage, and extensive window placement along the wall.
description_view_2: Rear angled view revealing the outdoor area, possibly a patio or pool, and additional windows and entry points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, more windows, and the continuation of the driveway and outdoor space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, direct path from driveway, and minimal overhang; no porch or columns visible.
